title: How to deactivate a listing/a SKU?
bodyHtml:
Step 1: If you want to deactivate one of your listings, you can change the stock of this listing to 0. This will set the listing offline.

Step 2: Note that you can't delete an offer, but you can archive it to clean your catalog.


Step 3: Once your listing is archived you can see it back easily by clicking on 'Archived'.

Step 4: If you want to push the offer live again you just have to click on 'Publish offer'.


 

Step 5: If you want to deactivate a lot of listings, you can send us the list of the corresponding SKU by filling the forms on the SSC.
